header.name: Pablo Aravena
summary.title: Summary
summary.text: I have extensive experience as a software developer for over 15 years. My expertise lies in various technologies and programming languages, particularly JavaScript and Java. One of my key areas of focus in my daily work is unit testing and functional testing, as they aid me in understanding user requirements before beginning any coding tasks. In essence, I am a software developer who prioritizes understanding user needs and then strives to implement the best solutions to meet those expectations.
professionalExperience.title: Professional Experience
professionalExperience.indeed.title: Full Stack Developer
professionalExperience.indeed.descriptio: Working as a Full Stack Developer on the Career Guide website. I build features using micro frontends with Mosaic (Indeed's in-house technology), server-side components, batch processes, and GraphQL APIs.
professionalExperience.indeed.activities: Build and maintain micro frontend components using React and TypeScript
Develop server-side features like Cron Jobs and GraphQL APIs using Node.js and Java
Define Contentful model types, to be consumed in the GraphQL APIs
Create Self Service Contentful web app
Create and optimize GraphQL APIs for data fetching
Implement batch processes for data processing tasks
professionalExperience.toptal.title: Full Stack Developer
professionalExperience.toptal.descriptio: As a freelance developer at Toptal.com, I worked on projects for companies like GigSmart, SteadyApp, Alteryx, and Halo By Hines.
Created integrations with Plaid and Argyle for financial data
Developed multiple screens and navigation flows
professionalExperience.toptal.gigSmart.a: Built GraphQL mutations and queries using Absinthe
Worked with Ecto for database operations
APIs consumed by React web apps using Relay
professionalExperience.toptal.alteryx.ac: Built backend with Java and Spring Boot
Implemented caching layer using Redis for better performance
Created frontend with React and TypeScript
professionalExperience.toptal.halo.title: Halo by Hines
professionalExperience.toptal.halo.activ: Built MVP web app for creating property advertisements
Integrated AI tools to generate marketing content automatically
Developed media upload system for property images
Created AI-generated visualizations of remodeled interiors and exteriors
professionalExperience.toptal.techList.2: Node.js, Java, Spring Framework, Python (Django, Flask)
professionalExperience.recoveryPlanner.d: I designed and built RPX, a web-based risk management application. I created the frontend using Angular and Material UI. I also built a mobile app prototype using Ionic and Meteor.
professionalExperience.nisum.title: Technical Lead
Built a deployment workflow system using Activiti BPMN and Spring Framework to manage software releases across multiple environments.
Created middleware to process and transform purchase orders from different systems into a common format. Used Cucumber for testing and practiced TDD.
Upgraded Point of Sale systems to support chip and PIN credit/debit cards (EMV standard).
professionalExperience.experian.title: Senior Developer
professionalExperience.experian.descript: Built and maintained web applications for lending and marketing. Key projects:
professionalExperience.experian.projects: A loan comparison website that helps users find the best credit options. The system collects user information, checks credit scores through external APIs, and shows matching lenders.
An internal tool for creating and managing marketing campaigns with workflow support for different team roles.
professionalExperience.fedex.title: Senior Developer
professionalExperience.fedex.description: Built software solutions for the Latin America and Caribbean region. Key projects:
A mobile app for processing low-value shipments, allowing data updates and generating customs reports.
A system that processes shipment manifest data (list of packages arriving on each flight). I helped create a unified solution that replaced country-specific systems. Started in Trinidad and Tobago, then expanded to Costa Rica, Mexico, Brazil, and other countries.

passions.programming.description: It is not only a job for me, I really enjoy programming and learn new things as much as possible.
passions.saxophone.title: Saxophone
passions.saxophone.description: It is still hard for me, but since I started learning music six years ago and discovered this wonderful instrument, I found a new world for me which I really enjoy :-).
